instructions: Step 1: Locate the bet display in the bottom-right area (currently shows '0.10').
Step 2: Read current bet value — record as starting_bet.
Step 3: Click the '-' button labeled 'Bet Decrease' in options.json repeatedly until the bet display shows '0.10' (coin 0.02 × 5 paylines).
Step 4: Verify the bet display reads exactly '0.10' (within ±1 ladder step tolerance, i.e.
not less than 0.10 since this is the minimum).
